title: arkopoda luteola
side_effects: Arkopoda luteola can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions in some individuals, which may manifest as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. In addition, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Furthermore, the plant's toxic compounds can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and decrease their effectiveness or increase the risk of bleeding. In severe cases, improper use of arkopoda luteola can even cause respiratory failure, cardiac arrest, or other life-threatening complications.
